svg.title: Runtime Evidence Panel Template
svg.desc: Three-panel template for live monitor, persisted event history, and caregiver-facing delivery evidence.
svg.text: Runtime Evidence Panel Template
Replace each placeholder with a real screenshot from one consistent defended runtime path
(a) Live monitor state
Insert real monitor screenshot here
Show live preview, pose overlay, active dataset/model/OP,
and current monitor state banner.
Preferred preset: CAUCAFall + TCN + OP-2
Hide local usernames, file paths, and unrelated browser content.
(b) Persisted event state
Insert event-history screenshot here
Show one persisted fall event with timestamp, type,
and review status visible in normal UI context.
Keep this panel from the same defended incident as panel (c)
Redact names or IDs if they appear in surrounding review fields.
(c) Delivery evidence
Insert Telegram delivery screenshot here
Keep the event reference and message structure visible,
but redact chat identifiers and personal details.
Same incident chain as panel (b)
This panel documents delivery-path existence, not benchmark quality.
Use this template only as an insertion scaffold. Replace all three placeholders before final submission if real runtime screenshots are available.
